problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
